title: Enable OTP verification [Phase 1]
goal: The goal is to improve the quality and reliability of Club Avolta customer registrations and be legally compliant by introducing a simple verification step for email addresses (and potentially phone numbers). This will help ensure that accounts are created with valid contact information, reduce fraud, and support compliance with local regulations in specific countries.
description:
Today, customers can register for Club Avolta without confirming that the email or phone number they provide is real. We aim to introduce a one-time verification code (OTP) for Germany and Austria as a first phase.

The rollout will be gradual across platforms (SSO Web, App, Tablets, Self Checkouts) to avoid operational disruptions. This change will help us protect the program from fake accounts, improve data accuracy, and meet legal requirements in markets like Germany and Austria.

Next countries considered: Greece, Norway, Switzerland, Luxembourg, and Italy.
